Title: Requires a police officer accompanying federal immigration officers to wear and use a body camera and secure the recordings
Summary: Requires certain police officers to wear and turn on body-worn cameras when accompanying an agent or officer of the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement or of U.S. Customs and Border Protection.
LawCode: Amd §234, Exec L; add §208-i, Gen Muni L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the executive law and the general municipal law, in relation to requiring a police officer accompanying federal immigration officers to wear and use a body camera and secure the recordings
